mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, system_prompt, category, match_keywords, match_mode, is_preset, is_active, sort_order, created_time, updated_time FROM prompt_template WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT id, name, description, system_prompt, category, match_keywords, match_mode, is_preset, is_active, sort_order, created_time, updated_time FROM prompt_template WHERE is_active = 1 AND match_mode = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT id, name, description, system_prompt, category, match_keywords, match_mode, is_preset, is_active, sort_order, created_time, updated_time FROM prompt_template WHERE is_active = 1 AND is_preset = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1
